mapper.select: SELECT user_card_id, user_id, card_type, card_network, last_four, expiry_month, expiry_year, provider, provider_token, provider_customer_id, cardholder_name, status, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM user_card_detail WHERE user_card_id = #{userCardId}::uuid
mapper.insert: insert into user_card_detail (user_card_id, user_id, card_type, card_network, last_four, expiry_month, expiry_year, provider, provider_token, provider_customer_id, cardholder_name, status, gmt_create, gmt_modified ) values (#{userCardId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cardType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::card_type, #{cardNetwork,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::card_network, #{lastFour,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{expiryMonth,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{expiryYear,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{provider,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::card_provider, #{providerToken,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{providerCustomerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cardholderName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::card_status, #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: SELECT user_card_id, user_id, card_type, card_network, last_four, expiry_month, expiry_year, provider, provider_token, provider_customer_id, cardholder_name, status, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM user_card_detail WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT user_card_id, user_id, card_type, card_network, last_four, expiry_month, expiry_year, provider, provider_token, provider_customer_id, cardholder_name, status, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM user_card_detail WHERE provider_token = #{providerToken} AND provider = #{provider}::card_provider
